evals.prompt: Run the evolution cycle in automated mode.
evals.expected_output: The skill should execute the evolution cycle and apply any identified improvements.
assertions: The script should run without errors
The script should apply any identified improvements

evals.prompt: Run the evolution cycle in review mode.
evals.expected_output: The skill should pause and ask for confirmation before applying any identified improvements.
assertions: The script should pause and ask for confirmation
The script should not apply any improvements without confirmation

evals.prompt: Run the evolution cycle in infinite loop mode.
evals.expected_output: The skill should continuously run the evolution cycle until manually stopped.
assertions: The script should continuously run the evolution cycle
The script should not stop until manually stopped

evals.prompt: Check the version of the skill.
evals.expected_output: The script should output the current version of the skill.
assertions: The script should output the current version
The output should match the version in package.json

evals.prompt: Run the evolution cycle with an invalid environment variable.
evals.expected_output: The script should handle the invalid environment variable gracefully and continue running.
assertions: The script should handle the invalid environment variable
The script should continue running without errors
